trustTrader.title: Trusted by Traders
trustTrader.subtitle: Real stories from real traders
trustTrader.quote1: I was losing money on fees without even knowing it. Now I get cashback every month.
trustTrader.quote2: Simple and works as promised. The on-chain thing is cool, I can check my balance anytime.
trustTrader.quote3: No more unclear rebate statements. I know exactly what I'm getting and when.
trustTrader.quote4: Tried it for 3 months, already earned more than my previous setup. Pretty solid.
trustTrader.quote5: Having all brokers in one dashboard is convenient. Everything is organized.
trustTrader.quote6: Withdrawal was fast. Claimed my rewards and received USDT the same day.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about rebates, fees, and how Zentrix stays transparent.

items.whatRebate: What is a rebate and where does it come from?
items.whatRebateBody: It's basically cashback on your trading fees. Your broker returns a part of the commission back to you based on your actual trading volume.
items.kycBody: Yes, KYC is needed for withdrawals to keep things secure and follow legal rules. It's usually a quick process and gets approved in just a few hours.
items.pool: What is the on-chain Pool? Is my money safe?
items.poolBody: The Pool is where your rebates are held on-chain. We only add funds once they're verified from the broker, and you can track everything on BSCScan.
items.receive: How long does it take to receive my rebates?
items.receiveBody: We track your trades as you go. Once the broker settles their payouts, your rebates are confirmed and ready to claim.
items.mlmBody: Not at all. Your earnings come strictly from the trading volume of people you refer. You never have to buy anything to participate.
items.multipleBody: Definitely! You can link as many broker accounts as you like to your Zentrix profile. All your rebates are consolidated in one place.

Forex and derivative trading involves significant risk. Please ensure compliance with the regulations applicable in your jurisdiction before participating.

aboutUs.title: About Us
aboutUs.body:
ABOUT US: ZENTRIX – BUILDING AUTOMATED & TRANSPARENT FINANCIAL INFRASTRUCTURE

Welcome to Zentrix – a pioneering financial technology platform that redefines transaction cost standards in the global market.

---

The Birth of Zentrix

In an ever-changing financial market, transaction costs have always been a major challenge for investors and institutions alike. Traditional rebate (backcom) models typically operate manually, rely heavily on human intervention, lack transparency, and frequently suffer from processing delays.

Zentrix was founded to break through these limitations. We did not enter the market as a traditional broker, but as a technology company (Fintech). By leveraging powerful server infrastructure and automated order-matching algorithms, Zentrix completely eliminates intermediary barriers, delivering a precisely optimized and fully closed-loop cost management process.

---

Vision & Mission

Vision: To become the world's leading infrastructure platform for transaction cost management and optimization (Rebate & Backcom Automation), establishing a new standard of transparency in the financial market.

Mission: To provide investors, fund managers, and B2B partners with an independent technology system – where all entitlements are calculated algorithmically, eliminating errors and returning the true, rightful value to users.

---

What Sets Zentrix Apart?

Rather than competing through promises, Zentrix competes through core technological capability:

1. Full Automation

At Zentrix, the process of calculating volume and rebates involves no human intervention. The system is programmed to connect directly with the data gateways of partner platforms, processing millions of data points and distributing entitlements seamlessly and accurately.

2. Independent & Objective

Zentrix is a neutral technology entity. We do not hold assets on behalf of users, do not interfere with trading strategies, and have no conflicts of interest with our users. We simply provide a secure technological "pipeline" through which your rebate cash flow is optimized.

3. Data Transparency

Every status, rate, and technical parameter is digitized and displayed in real time on your Dashboard. What you see is exactly what the system is executing – no hidden fees, no ambiguity.

---

Commitment from the Zentrix Team

Led by a team of experts with deep knowledge of system architecture and financial data, Zentrix is committed to continuously upgrading its infrastructure, improving server latency, and expanding its partner network.


Our goal is clear: Let you focus 100% on trading decisions and growing your financial career – leave the complex cost optimization and calculations to Zentrix technology.

---

©2026 Zentrix – Professional, Transparent and Secure Platform.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.body:
PRIVACY POLICY

Last Updated: 19/04/2026

Welcome to Zentrix. We understand that privacy and the security of personal data are your top concerns when using our platform. This Privacy Policy has been established to transparently explain how Zentrix collects, processes, stores, and protects your information when you access and use our services at https://www.zentrix.cash

By accessing, registering an account, and continuing to use Zentrix's services, you are deemed to have read, agreed to, and fully accepted the terms set forth in this Policy.

---

1. Personal Data Collected

Zentrix applies the principle of minimal data collection, requesting only information that is truly necessary to operate and optimize the service for you. This information includes:

- Identity and Contact Data: Email address, phone number (if provided), and information you submit when sending support requests to our customer care center.

- Platform Linkage Data: Your user account ID (UID) on partner trading platforms, for the purpose of reconciling and processing entitlements/rebates (where applicable).

- Technical and Automated Data: When you access the website, our system automatically records non-identifying data such as: IP address, browser type, device type, operating system, access time, page navigation behavior, and data from Cookies.

---

2. Purposes of Data Processing and Use

All collected data will be processed by Zentrix in full compliance with applicable laws and solely for the following legitimate purposes:

- Service Operation: Supporting connection, verification, and processing of transactions, as well as recording rebates or related incentives for your account.

- Customer Care: Receiving, responding to, and resolving complaints, technical issues, or support requests from you.


- Platform Improvement: Analyzing statistical data to upgrade the interface, website performance, and deliver the most optimized personalized experience.


- Security and Compliance: Detecting and promptly preventing fraudulent behavior, cyberattacks, system abuse, or violations of Zentrix's Terms of Use.

---

3. Core Principles on Digital Asset Security

As a platform that prioritizes financial integrity and security, Zentrix absolutely commits to NOT collecting and NOT requesting users to provide any of the following sensitive data:

- Never requests account Passwords on third-party exchanges/platforms.
- Never requests Private Keys or Seed Phrases.
- Never intervenes in or requests access to trading, deposit/withdrawal functions.
- Never stores, manages, or holds any of your assets or funds.

Note: The Zentrix team will never proactively contact you to request the sensitive information mentioned above. Please be vigilant against impersonation attempts.

---

4. Disclosure and Sharing of Data with Third Parties

Zentrix strictly adheres to confidentiality principles and does not sell, rent, or commercially exchange your personal data. We only share information minimally, in the following truly necessary cases:

- Strategic Partners: Sharing basic information (such as UID) with affiliated exchanges/partners to reconcile data and fulfill reward/rebate obligations.

- Legal Requirements: Disclosing information to law enforcement or competent state authorities upon lawful written request, in compliance with applicable regulations.

- Rights Protection: When sharing is necessary to protect the assets, legitimate interests, and safety of Zentrix, the user community, and the public.

---

5. Cookie Management and Tracking Technologies

The Zentrix platform uses Cookies (small text files stored on your device) and tracking technologies (Web Beacons, Pixels) to remember login preferences, maintain sessions, and analyze traffic. You can fully disable Cookies through your browser settings; however, this may limit certain features and the enhanced experience on our platform.

---

6. Data Protection and Storage Measures


Zentrix applies advanced data encryption standards along with strict technical and organizational security measures to guard against unauthorized access, theft, copying, or destruction of data. However, the Internet is never 100% secure. Despite our maximum efforts to protect your information, Zentrix cannot guarantee absolute protection against cybersecurity risks beyond our control.

---

7. Rights of Data Subjects

At Zentrix, you retain control over your personal data, including the following rights:

- Right of Access and Rectification: Request extraction or correction of inaccurate personal information.

- Right to Erasure (Right to be Forgotten): Request deletion of your personal information from our systems when the data is no longer needed for its original collection purpose.


- Right to Object: Unsubscribe from marketing newsletters or promotional emails at any time.

To exercise these rights, please contact Zentrix's Customer Care team directly.

---

8. Links to Third-Party Platforms


Zentrix's website may contain links to third-party platforms, exchanges, or services. Please note that these websites operate independently and have their own Privacy Policies. Zentrix is exempt from all legal liability related to the content, data collection methods, and security levels of these external platforms.

---

9. Policy Updates


Zentrix reserves the right to amend, supplement, or update this Privacy Policy at any time to comply with changes in applicable law or service development directions. All changes take effect immediately upon publication of the new version on the website. You should regularly check this section to stay informed of the latest updates.

---

10. Contact Information

For any questions, complaints, or feedback regarding this Privacy Policy, please contact the Zentrix team through the following official channels:

- Website: https://www.zentrix.cash
- Support Email: support@zentrix.cash
- Hotline/Zalo: [Phone Number]
- Office Address: [Office Address]

---

©2026 Zentrix – Professional, Transparent and Secure Platform.

riskWarning.title: Risk Warning
riskWarning.body:
DISCLAIMER & RISK WARNING

Last Updated: 19/04/2026

Before using the services and solutions at Zentrix, please read this Statement carefully. By continuing to access, link your account, or use Zentrix's system, you are deemed to have fully acknowledged, understood, and unconditionally accepted the risks described below.

---

1. Core Nature of the Zentrix Platform


Zentrix operates solely as a Technology Intermediary Platform, specializing in transaction cost optimization solutions (rebates/backcom) by linking with partner brokers.

- Zentrix is NOT a Broker, Liquidity Provider, or Investment Fund.
- Zentrix does NOT provide financial advisory services, asset management, or trading recommendations in any form.
- All information, statistics, or content on the website is for reference purposes only.

---

2. Specific Risks of Financial Markets & Leverage

Trading margin financial products (such as Forex, Commodities, Cryptocurrencies, CFDs) carries an extremely high level of risk and is not suitable for everyone.

- The use of financial leverage can amplify profits, but simultaneously amplifies losses rapidly.
- You may lose some or all of your initial invested capital due to unpredictable market fluctuations.
- You should never invest money that you cannot afford to lose.

---

3. Clarification on the Nature of "Rebates" (Backcom)


The rebates or incentives you receive through the Zentrix system are merely a mechanism to reduce transaction costs based on the trading volume executed.

- These rebates are NOT a guarantee of a profitable trading strategy.
- Zentrix is entirely exempt from responsibility for any losses arising from your trading decisions, capital management, or strategies (including hedging, EA, or manual trading).

---

4. Exemption from Third-Party Risks (Brokers)

Zentrix operates independently and has no authority to intervene in the server systems, order execution policies, or fund flows of partner brokers. We disclaim all legal liability in the following cases:

- A broker changes its policies, alters commission rates, or refuses to pay entitlements due to violations of the broker's terms.
- Slippage, spread widening, server errors, or trade orders rejected by the Broker's platform.
- Risks related to deposits/withdrawals, liquidity risks, or cases where a Broker declares bankruptcy or ceases operations.


---

5. System and Network Technology Risks

Although Zentrix always strives to maintain stable server infrastructure and accurate automated calculations, we cannot guarantee the system will not be interrupted due to objective factors.

Zentrix is not responsible for losses arising from:

- API delays
- Fiber optic outages
- Internet connection failures
- Scheduled maintenance
- Cybersecurity incidents (such as DDoS attacks) beyond our control

---

6. Personal Responsibility of Users

As an independent investor, you bear 100% responsibility for:

- Assessing your own financial capacity, experience, and risk appetite before participating in trading.
- Securing your account information and bearing legal responsibility for fulfilling personal income tax obligations (if applicable) arising from profits or rebates in your country of residence.


---

7. Contact

If you do not fully understand any of the risks described in this Statement, please consult independent financial and legal advisors before using Zentrix's services.

For any questions about the Risk Warning, please contact:

- Website: https://www.zentrix.cash
- Support Email: support@zentrix.cash

---

©2026 Zentrix – Professional, Transparent and Secure Platform.
